title: hieracium glaucinum subsp. fragiliforme
intro: Hieracium glaucinum subsp. fragiliforme, also known as a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium glaucinum subsp. fragiliforme is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
